description: Polly is a .NET resilience and transient-fault-handling library that allows developers to express policies such as Retry, Circuit Breaker, Timeout, Bulkhead Isolation, and Fallback in a fluent and thread-safe manner. From version 6.0.1, Polly targets .NET Standard 1.1 and 2.0+.
commit_message:
Update .NET SDK to 10.0.301 (#3109)

* Update .NET SDK

Update .NET SDK to version 10.0.301.
